productDisplayName: W Women Thread Work Pink Kurta
description: Composition Pink U-neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with contrast woven panelling, half buttoned placket, embroidery, thread work, bead embellishments, stud detailing and woven panelling on the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look fabulous in this retro-style kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
